metadata.source: Skyguide AIP / VAC LSZG (VRP names confirmed from public AIP); coordinates are plugin-author approximations
metadata.notes: VRP names (E, E1, HE, HW, W, S, ABM ALTREU) are taken from the published Swiss AIP and are real-world facts. Coordinates here are plugin-author approximations and MUST be cross-checked against the current Skyguide VAC LSZG before merge — they are NOT copied from any commercial source. When the user has a Navigraph subscription installed (Custom Data/cycle_info.txt present), the optional NavigraphSource layer overrides these coordinates at runtime with more precise values; Navigraph data never enters this repository. Pattern-direction values (06=left, 24=right) need pilot verification — provisional. Arrival routes are plausibility-based suggestions and need VAC verification.
